title: Spanish-Style Grilled Tomaquet and Provolona Sandwich
description: A simple yet indulgent Spanish-inspired sandwich featuring grilled tomaquet and provola cheese.
instructions: 2. Slice the tomaquet in half and brush with amb.
3. Grill the tomaquet for 3-4 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
4. Meanwhile, toast the pa slices on the grill.
5. Assemble the sandwich by placing a slice of toasted pa on a plate, followed by a slice of provolona cheese, a grilled tomaquet half, and finally another slice of toasted pa.
6. Drizzle with extra virgin olive oil and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
